printed.name: Teaser Prep
printed.setup: Sitting in balanced position, back flat, arms straight and reaching forward, in line with shoulders, parallel to Mat, legs lifted, knees bent, shins parallel to Mat

movement.inhale: Roll up, return to start position

cues: Engage spinal extensors to complete movement
Articulate through spine when rolling down and up
Initiate roll down and roll up with lumbar flexion
